evals.name: strong-idea-absolute
evals.prompt: Score the quality of the research idea in evals/sample_ideas/strong_grpo.md (Title/Motivation/Method). Give me the per-axis assessment and overall score.
evals.expected_output: Absolute A/B/C review with quoted evidence; high overall (verdict strong, no A/C-gate cap). A high (real, open foundation gap: is the critic necessary), B high with depth/soundness/feasibility decomposed in the reason, C high (group-mean baseline directly removes the critic = targets the stated gap). No prior-art search, no fabricated results.

evals.name: weak-idea-absolute
evals.prompt: How good is the research idea in evals/sample_ideas/weak_temperature.md? Rate it.
evals.expected_output: Absolute A/B/C review; low overall (verdict weak). A low (vague 'a bit faster' soft target), B low (incremental one-scalar tweak), C low (a softmax temperature does not reduce inference cost — wrong-problem fit). A/C gate likely fires (A and/or C <= 2 cap at borderline, but band is already weak). No prior-art, no fabricated results.

evals.name: ac-gate-mismatch
evals.prompt: Review the idea in evals/sample_ideas/mismatch_gate.md and give it a quality score.
evals.expected_output: Tests the A/C gate: A is high (memorization-threshold gap is real and open) and the method is competently specified, but C is very low (a faster dataloader does NOT address the memorization-threshold question — method solves a different problem). The verdict must NOT be 'strong' — the A/C gate caps it at borderline-or-below, with a one-line note that low problem-fit drives the cap. This is the key discriminator: an equal-weight mean would wrongly read 'strong'.

evals.name: pairwise-blind
evals.prompt: Compare the two research ideas in evals/sample_ideas/strong_grpo.md and evals/sample_ideas/weak_temperature.md. Which is stronger and why? Judge them blind to source.
evals.expected_output: Absolute block for each idea, then a pairwise verdict table over A/B/C (with B's depth/soundness/feasibility sub-winners noted) and an overall winner = the GRPO idea (strong_grpo.md), judged blind to source.
